title: SlashTopicMemoryProfile
description: Memory Mesh profile contract for Slash Topic scopes. Governs recall, writeback, retention, redaction, summarization, promotion, forgetting, and evidence for a given Slash Topic scope. Also defines dry-run behaviour for Lattice query routing.

memoryProfileRef.description: Stable URI reference for this memory profile. Maps directly to Lattice QueryRoutingDryRunPlan.memoryProfileRef.

slashTopicScope.description: Identifies the Slash Topic scope and optional New Hope membrane admission context.

channelRef.description: Optional channel reference within the topic scope.

recallPolicy.description: Controls how memory is recalled for this Slash Topic scope.

sensitivePayloadStorage.description: Whether raw sensitive payloads may be stored. 'disallowed' is the secure default.

scopeOrder.description: Optional ordered list of scope dimensions for recall resolution.

includeRelations.description: Whether to include relation graph entries in recall results.

includeRawEvents.description: Whether raw event payloads may be surfaced. Requires an explicit allow policy.

writebackPolicy.description: Controls memory writeback behaviour. In dry-run mode writeback must be 'no-writeback'.

enabled.description: Master writeback switch. When false no memory is written regardless of dryRunMode.

dryRunMode.description: Behaviour when this profile is used in a dry-run query routing pass. 'no-writeback' is the required default.

allowedMemoryClasses.description: Memory classes that may be written back when writeback is enabled and not in dry-run.

retention.description: Retention posture for memories stored under this profile.

evidenceRequired.description: Whether an evidence reference is mandatory before a memory entry may be promoted or exported.

redaction.description: Redaction rules applied before any stored or recalled content is surfaced.

sensitivityThreshold.description: Minimum sensitivity level that triggers redaction.

redactedFields.description: Explicit list of payload fields to redact.

summarization.description: Summarization settings applied to memories before writeback or promotion.

summaryClass.description: Memory class assigned to automatically generated summary entries.

promotion.description: Governs elevation of topic-scoped memories to wider scopes.

enabled.description: Whether promotion from this scope is permitted.

promotionTargetScope.description: Target scope identifier for promoted memories (e.g. 'workspace', 'user').

requiresApproval.description: Whether human approval is required before promotion executes.

forgetting.description: Policy governing deletion or expiry of memories in this scope.

policy.description: Mechanism by which memories are forgotten.

labProfile.description: Tunes embedding, NLP, and multimodal behaviour without launching background lab jobs.

embeddingModel.description: Named embedding model to use for this topic scope.

multimodalEnabled.description: Whether multimodal inputs are accepted for this scope.

launchLabJobs.description: Must always be false. Lab profile selection configures behaviour only; it does not trigger background lab jobs.

dryRun.description: Dry-run configuration for Lattice query routing. When enabled the profile produces memoryProfileRef and memoryEventRef identifiers without performing any recall or writeback.

enabled.description: When true the profile operates in dry-run mode.

queryRoutingPlan.description: Explicit mapping to Lattice QueryRoutingDryRunPlan fields.

memoryProfileRef.description: Stable reference emitted for the memory profile in a dry-run pass. Corresponds to Lattice QueryRoutingDryRunPlan.memoryProfileRef.

memoryEventRef.description: Event reference emitted without performing recall or writeback. Corresponds to Lattice QueryRoutingDryRunPlan.memoryEventRef.

evidenceRefs.description: Stable evidence URIs that justify or audit this memory profile configuration.
